belier.intro: The day after the New Moon in Taurus, dear Aries, the waxing crescent lights up your zone of resources and deep values. Mars, your ruler, invites you to move gently from the intention you planted yesterday to a single concrete gesture. Today favors a tiny but real action over waiting for the perfect spark.
belier.love: Venus in Gemini brings a playful breeze to your bonds and makes words easier to offer. If you are partnered, you can voice a precise need without dressing it up as a complaint. If you are single, a light conversation may reveal an unexpected spark, let yourself be surprised by another's wit.
belier.work: The financial seed you planted yesterday now asks for tending, not a major overhaul. You have the chance to revisit a budget, send a key message, or set a rate you barely dared to name. A small practical decision today will steady the whole month.
belier.energy: Your fire is rekindling after the lunar dark but stays tender, give yourself soft transitions between tasks. A short outdoor walk will refresh your breath.
belier.intuition: The young Taurus Moon whispers that slowness is a form of power. Notice the first image that arises this morning, it carries a clue for the weeks ahead.
belier.mantra: One small step today beats a thousand intentions
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: You open a brand new solar and lunar cycle in your own sky, dear Taurus, and the day carries the freshness of a first morning. The Sun and Moon are still close in your sign, a rare alignment between what you want and what you feel. Venus in Gemini adds a curious, light, almost amused note to this beginning.
taureau.love: Your aura draws others without effort today, like warm earth under the May sun. If you are partnered, you can suggest a gentle ritual to mark the new cycle, a meal, a walk, an honest word. If you are single, naming what you truly seek opens doors that shyness had closed.
taureau.work: Today is not for grand conquests but for a first tangible step toward what you seeded yesterday. You can write three very concrete stages, set up a tool, or tidy your workspace to welcome the new. Movement matters more than performance.
taureau.energy: Your body savors this rebirth and asks for simple pleasures, a long shower, a seasonal fruit, a guilt-free nap. Honor your senses, they are your compass.
taureau.intuition: The Sun and Moon meeting in your sign open a direct channel between your heart and your deepest desire. Note what you feel on waking, it is a message worth keeping.
taureau.mantra: I begin softly what will last a long time
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: Venus is shining in your sign, dear Gemini, and her presence makes you especially magnetic in conversation. The waxing Taurus Moon, however, invites you to a fertile inner pause before your solar return approaches. Mercury, your ruler, supports thoughts that settle rather than those that fly away.
gemeaux.love: With Venus at home, you have the chance to rediscover your own talent for charming with grace and humor. If you are partnered, a tender and funny phrase can defuse a tension that lingered. If you are single, your verbal charm works well, choose carefully who receives your time.
gemeaux.work: The cycle ahead asks you to clarify one intention rather than juggle ten. You can list three ideas you truly want to carry in the coming weeks and let the rest go without guilt. Focus will be your most precious ally.
gemeaux.energy: Your mind spins fast, drop into your body through slow breathing or a gentle stretch. Drink a little more water than usual.
gemeaux.intuition: The Taurus stillness offers a gift, the chance to hear what your buzz usually covers. Ask yourself one simple question tonight and let the answer arrive on its own.
gemeaux.mantra: I choose one path and honor it
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The young Taurus Moon brushes your zone of friendships and collective projects, dear Cancer. You may feel a wish to reconnect with a circle that resembles you, or to plant a friendly intention for the month. The Moon, your ruler, offers a day where social bonds taste especially sweet.
cancer.love: The mood favors tender reunions and conversations that mend old threads. If you are partnered, you can dream together about a shared project, even a modest one, that gives shape to the months ahead. If you are single, a meeting in a group or through a friend may plant an interesting seed.
cancer.work: You have the chance to spot an ally, a mentor, or a network that could support your longer-term ambitions. An informal exchange today might open a concrete door tomorrow. Do not hesitate to name clearly what you need.
cancer.energy: Your vitality enjoys the warmth of others today, accept an invitation rather than retreating. A shared activity refills you more than a solo evening.
cancer.intuition: The gentle Moon reminds you that you are surrounded by more support than you believe. Ask yourself whom you want to thank, and simply do it.
cancer.mantra: I let the support offered to me come in
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The waxing Taurus Moon activates your career summit, dear Leo, and lights up your vocation and visibility. You may feel a quiet call to clarify the image you want to embody in the months ahead. The Sun, your ruler, still in Taurus, helps you root that desire in the real world.
lion.love: If you are partnered, the shape of your shared life project may surface in a fruitful talk. You can voice a shared ambition without fearing you sound too serious. If you are single, a person who shares your professional values may draw your eye more than expected.
lion.work: Today is well suited to writing down a precise career intention and storing it somewhere lasting. You have the chance to revise your public positioning, your site, your bio, or a presentation you kept delaying. One targeted action beats a sweeping rethink.
lion.energy: Your tone is good but your ego sometimes asks for more attention than your body, balance both with a little physical movement. Resist the urge to finish everything today.
lion.intuition: Your heart already senses how it wants to shine in the next cycle, give it space to whisper. Walk alone for a few minutes and listen.
lion.mantra: I radiate what I truly am
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: Yesterday's New Moon in Taurus activates your zone of broader horizons, dear Virgo. You may feel a wish to learn, to wander mentally, or to sign up for something that helps you grow. Mercury, your ruler, supports clear thinking about the direction you want for the months ahead.
vierge.love: The mood favors bonds nourished by shared meaning over plain proximity. If you are partnered, a talk about a belief or a dream can bring you closer at a deep level. If you are single, someone met in a learning or travel context might touch you unexpectedly.
vierge.work: You have the chance to explore a course, a founding book, or a project that broadens your professional field. A bit of research today may light up an important decision in a few weeks. Do not underestimate the value of a good question.
vierge.energy: Your body enjoys a gentle novelty, change a route, a habit, a time slot to stir what feels alive. Subtle motion restores you better than abrupt effort.
vierge.intuition: An idea bigger than you wants to step into your life, leave room for it to settle. Note your dreams tonight, they may carry a clue.
vierge.mantra: I open my horizon with curiosity
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The young Taurus Moon touches your zone of intimate bonds and shared resources, dear Libra. You may sense a longing for depth in your relationships, or a need to clarify a financial exchange that weighed on you. Venus, your ruler, in Gemini adds breath and lightness to this honest review.
balance.love: Emotional intimacy feels especially fertile today, particularly if you dare to name what flows under the surface. If you are partnered, a soft confession can transform the quality of the bond. If you are single, you may feel more magnetic than usual, trust your body's signals as much as your mind.
balance.work: A shared money question, a contract, a debt, a joint budget, may benefit from being clarified today. You have the chance to address a financial topic you kept postponing. Precision protects the relationship.
balance.energy: Your body asks for sensory calm after a busy week. A quiet evening will restore you more than a late outing.
balance.intuition: An inner truth wants to be heard, dare to name it even if only to yourself. The courage to be honest within is a precious gift.
balance.mantra: I speak what is true with tenderness
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The young Taurus Moon gently opposes your sign, dear Scorpio, and activates your zone of partnerships. You may feel a wish to redefine an important bond, romantic, friendly, or professional. Pluto, your ruler, supports a quiet but real shift in how you relate to others.
scorpion.love: The bond with others takes on a special flavor, as if each exchange could reveal something. If you are partnered, you can name a clear intention for the cycle ahead. If you are single, an encounter may carry an almost karmic quality, without needing to rush anything.
scorpion.work: A collaboration, a key client, or a partner could become the subject of a decisive talk this weekend. You have the chance to reset the basis of a partnership with more balance and mutual respect. A spoken word beats a silent rumination.
scorpion.energy: Your natural intensity benefits from being channeled into gentle movement. Avoid stimulants in the evening to protect your sleep.
scorpion.intuition: You sense what others leave unsaid, share that insight generously rather than analytically. Your clarity is a tool of care when offered with tenderness.
scorpion.mantra: I meet the other from my quiet truth
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The waxing Taurus Moon activates your zone of daily rhythm and routines, dear Sagittarius. You may feel an urge to anchor a healthy ritual or bring some order to your days. Jupiter, your ruler, reminds you that greatness grows from small disciplines held with joy.
sagittaire.love: Attention to the small details of shared life can nourish the bond more than a grand declaration. If you are partnered, a tender service rendered carries the weight of a gift. If you are single, care for your daily habits, your inner glow will do the rest.
sagittaire.work: You have the chance to set up a new professional routine, a pace, a tool, a schedule that truly fits you. A grounded structure today can save you several hours each week. Do not underestimate the power of a simple system.
sagittaire.energy: Your body needs consistency more than feats, pick a regular movement you can keep up. A daily walk will do more than one intense session.
sagittaire.intuition: Your body speaks louder than usual, listen to fatigue, hunger, thirst as messengers. Today's wisdom is earthy and practical.
sagittaire.mantra: I tend to the present to build something great
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The young Taurus Moon lights up your zone of pleasure and creativity, dear Capricorn. You may feel an unusual wish for lightness, play, art, or simply softness. Saturn, your ruler, welcomes this joyful pause as a true act of maturity.
capricorne.love: The mood favors tender, playful moments far from heavy talks. If you are partnered, a shared activity done just for fun will seal the bond more than any review. If you are single, you shine brighter when you are having fun, head to the places that make you smile.
capricorne.work: A creative intention set today can bear fruit for many months. You have the chance to launch a project that truly looks like you, even if it strays from expected boxes. Joy is a strategic indicator, not a luxury.
capricorne.energy: Your body asks for pleasure, a good meal, a dance, a moment in the sun. Seriousness can wait until Monday.
capricorne.intuition: Your inner child has something to tell you, take five minutes to listen. The path they point to is not naive, it is simply alive.
capricorne.mantra: My joy also builds my future
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The waxing Taurus Moon activates your zone of home and roots, dear Aquarius. You may feel an unusual call to tend to your living space, your family, or your inner child. Uranus, your ruler, supports a soft but real shift in how you relate to emotional safety.
verseau.love: Domestic intimacy gains ground, and a moment shared at home is worth a thousand outings. If you are partnered, you can speak about what you want to build together in the months ahead. If you are single, tend to your nest, love loves to enter welcoming spaces.
verseau.work: A question tied to your workspace, your remote setup, or your home organization deserves attention. You have the chance to arrange your space to better serve your focus. The inner frame shapes the outer work.
verseau.energy: Your body asks for cocooning, give yourself a truly quiet Saturday if you can. Deep sleep awaits you if you let go of screens early.
verseau.intuition: Your family line speaks through small coincidences today. Note what crosses your mind, it may be a legacy asking to be named.
verseau.mantra: I root myself to better rise
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The young Taurus Moon activates your zone of speech and exchanges, dear Pisces. You may feel a wish to finally voice what has been simmering for a while. Neptune, your ruler, helps you dress your words in softness without losing any of their precision.
poissons.love: Honest expression flows particularly well today. If you are partnered, the right phrase can dissolve a misunderstanding that lasted weeks. If you are single, a heartfelt message can reopen a door you thought was closed.
poissons.work: A written communication, a key message, or a presentation can be finely crafted today. You have the chance to settle your professional voice into something clearer, more grounded, more yours. Read your draft out loud before sending.
poissons.energy: Your nervous system enjoys soft sounds and quiet spaces. Limit loud talks at the end of the day to stay centered.
poissons.intuition: A truth wants to leave your mouth, welcome it before judging it. Your words carry healing power when they align with your heart.
poissons.mantra: I speak with tenderness what I know to be true
poissons.author: Sibylle
